summary_text: Assuming `usage_90d` and `blast_radius` are unknown, I‚Äôd avoid `retire` in this pass and classify as: - `gh-address-comments` ‚Üí `merge` (target: `openclaw-github`) - Narrow GitHub sub-workflow that fits as a specialized mode under the shared GitHub foundation. - `gh-fix-ci` ‚Üí `merge` (target: `openclaw-github`) - CI-debug workflow is a domain variant, not a separate platform capability. - `openclaw-github` ‚Üí `keep` - Foundational GitHub capability layer with broad reuse across repo operations. - `notebooklm-shared` ‚Üí `keep` - Shared boundary/control layer; high architectural value for consistency and safety. - `notebooklm-visual-brief` ‚Üí `merge` (target: `notebooklm-shared`) - Best treated as a template/profile on top of the shared NotebookLM core. - `cc-secretary` ‚Üí `replace` - Monolithic ‚Äúassistant system‚Äù scope is likely too broad; split into composable, bounded skills. - `note-manuscript` ‚Üí `keep` - Distinct, quality-gated writing workflow with clear specialization. - `create-plan` ‚Üí `keep` - Lightweight cross-domain primitive that improves consistency with low maintenance cost.
